commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a guarded embedded-agent subscriber fast path for plain `text_delta` chunks and focused regressions for directive tails and previously stripped reply metadata.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +65. Total +101 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction of the linked Windows/local-model starvation was established in this read-only review. The scoped subscriber behavior is source-reproducible from current main's full parse path, the PR diff, and focused regression tests.

target.title: fix(agents): avoid full stream replay on text deltas
target.body:
## Summary
- avoid reparsing the full accumulated assistant stream for ordinary plain text deltas in the embedded subscriber
- keep full reply-directive parsing for `text_end`, phase-aware replies, silent tokens, media/reply/audio directives, and streams whose prior raw text was already cleaned
- add regressions for held directive tails and stripped directive metadata staying out of later deltas

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed after final rebase to `da7fb64aa48`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts` - passed
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts` - passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 1 file / 33 tests passed after final rebase
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings; `overall: patch is correct (0.86)`
- AWS Crabbox: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 60m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`; provider `aws`, lease `cbx_728ab79ceb29`, slug `brisk-barnacle`, run `run_fed87d48fbba`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Plain assistant text deltas no longer force full accumulated reply-directive parsing on every chunk while directive-bearing, final, and phase-aware paths keep the canonical full parse.
Real environment tested: Focused local Vitest wrapper, formatting/lint checks, autoreview, and AWS Crabbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section above.
Evidence after fix: Focused subscriber regression tests pass after rebasing onto current `origin/main`; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed on the refreshed branch.
Observed result after fix: Ordinary plain deltas reuse the incremental visible delta instead of replaying the full accumulated stream, while incomplete directive tails and previously stripped directives stay suppressed.
What was not tested: Live Ollama/API runtime was not rerun for this focused subscriber hot-path PR.
